/* This file is automatically generated by ABP framework to use MVC Controllers from JavaScript. */ var abp = abp || {}; abp.services = abp.services || {}; // module 'app' (function(){ abp.services.app = abp.services.app || {}; // controller 'maintenanceWindowModal' (function(){ abp.services.app.maintenanceWindowModal = abp.services.app.maintenanceWindowModal || {}; // action 'shouldShow' abp.services.app.maintenanceWindowModal.shouldShow = function(ajaxParams) { return abp.ajax($.extend(true, { url: abp.appPath + 'api/services/app/MaintenanceWindowModal/ShouldShow', type: 'POST' }, ajaxParams)); }; // action 'confirmCurrentMaintenanceWindow' abp.services.app.maintenanceWindowModal.confirmCurrentMaintenanceWindow = function(ajaxParams) { return abp.ajax($.extend(true, { url: abp.appPath + 'api/services/app/MaintenanceWindowModal/ConfirmCurrentMaintenanceWindow', type: 'POST' }, ajaxParams)); }; // action 'getMaintenanceWindowModalViewModel' abp.services.app.maintenanceWindowModal.getMaintenanceWindowModalViewModel = function(ajaxParams) { return abp.ajax($.extend(true, { url: abp.appPath + 'api/services/app/MaintenanceWindowModal/GetMaintenanceWindowModalViewModel', type: 'GET' }, ajaxParams)); }; })(); })();
